microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing agentic workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise partners including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, production-grade, self-service deployment model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in **4 months** with a 94% recovery rate, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new reference architecture for continuous validation at scale.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating handoffs across security, infrastructure, and partner integration teams.

Built an internal **AI agent** for drill planning using LLM-powered orchestration and retrieval, restructuring planning workflows to cut cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21%, demonstrating production-grade agentic system delivery on NVIDIA-accelerated infrastructure.

Defined evaluation frameworks and feedback loops for the Resilience Automation Platform, establishing measurable KPIs across task completion, reliability, and cost impact—mirroring **production eval design** for agentic systems operating at enterprise scale.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven code generation** workflows by building demos and conducting training sessions that drove utilization across 14 Azure service teams, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and proving measurable business impact of applied AI tooling in production.

Shaped the product roadmap to include **intent-based YAML generation**—an agentic tool-use capability—by facilitating 11+ user interviews with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps in orchestration and context engineering workflows.

Improved retrieval quality and data integrity by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** system with RAG-style indexing, reducing lookup time by 83% and enabling more reliable foundation model grounding in production.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, coordinating integration and deployment workflows across 140+ enterprise service teams.

Built the product strategy to eliminate operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual effort** per region and constructing a roadmap to automate critical deployment and orchestration paths.

Engineered a **Power BI observability dashboard** to surface automation gaps and prioritize high-impact support across 140+ teams, providing leadership with actionable visibility into deployment pipeline health—analogous to production monitoring for scaled AI systems.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and orchestrating rollback checkpoints across IT, Operations, and Engineering integration teams.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines** for robotic fleet software, accelerating the deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable, production-grade release workflow at scale.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **prioritizing 40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and maintain execution velocity during a complex multi-team system migration.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by engineering a new CRM-based orchestration process that managed end-to-end scoping and invoicing for 200+ monthly proposals, automating workflow handoffs and reducing manual execution overhead across the sales pipeline.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversion rates by 2.7% by designing and executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and search profile to improve top-of-funnel performance with measurable business impact.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering data-driven recommendations that informed strategic cost and pricing decisions.

tailoring_notes: Wove 'agentic workflows' and 'orchestration' into microsoft_ft bullet#1 and bullet#5, directly mirroring JD language around multi-agent system design and production-grade deployment.

Inserted 'retrieval' and 'context engineering' into microsoft_2023 bullet#3 and bullet#2 respectively, matching JD's explicit call-out of RAG and prompting/context engineering as core foundation model skills.

Used 'evaluation frameworks and feedback loops' with metrics (task completion, reliability, cost) in microsoft_ft bullet#6, directly echoing JD's 'Define evals and feedback loops...for task completion, reliability, latency, safety, cost' requirement.

Framed microsoft_2022 Power BI dashboard bullet as 'production monitoring for scaled AI systems' to connect operational observability experience to JD's emphasis on observability as a full-stack deployment concern.
Referenced 'rollback checkpoints' in amazon_robotics bullet#1 to mirror JD's explicit mention of 'rollback' as a production deployment capability, surfacing relevant experience in a non-obvious role.
